verification.target_vocab_notes: プール appears in the middle of the sentence.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはいまぷーるでおよいでいる。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (泳いでいる - is swimming). Progressive ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている progressive form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: プール appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そのがっこうにはりっぱなぷーるがある。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: には particle, na-adjective (立派な), が particle, ある (existence). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Existence sentence with na-adjective modifier. Vocabulary 立派 is slightly advanced but structure is N5.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with existence pattern and adjective modification.

verification.target_vocab_notes: プール appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あつかったので、ぷーるでおよぎました。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ので causal conjunction (暑かったので - because it was hot). ので is N4 grammar for expressing complex reasons.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ので conjunction.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ので causal conjunction. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 小さい appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Minor error: ちーさい should be ちいさい (with い not ー). Using long vowel mark instead of い.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, が particle, i-adjective. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple descriptive sentence with body part. Clear structure.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is good but kana has minor error (ちーさい instead of ちいさい).

verification.target_vocab_notes: 小さい appears modifying 声 (voice).
verification.kana_notes: Minor error: ちーさい should be ちいさい.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, で particle, ta-form (話した). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Past tense with adverbial phrase. Natural sentence structure.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is N5 but kana error (ちーさい instead of ちいさい).

verification.target_vocab_notes: 小さい appears modifying 部屋 (room).
verification.kana_notes: Minor error: ちーさい and おおきい should be ちいさい and おおきい.
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (置いている - has placed/is placing). State ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている form and kana errors.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 今週 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: せんせいにこんしゅうあえますか。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential form 会える (can meet). Potential forms are N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to potential form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 potential form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 今週 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはこんしゅうはおやすみです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle (double は for emphasis), です copula. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple statement with time expression. Clear and practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for time expressions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 今週 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはこんしゅうおやすみです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, です copula. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple statement. Nearly identical to example_index 1 but without double は.
verification.overall_notes: Good simple N5 example. Essentially duplicate of example_index 1.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 肉 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはないふでにくをきった。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, で particle (instrument), を particle, ta-form (切った). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Simple past action with instrument. Clear structure.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example with instrument で particle.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: にくはこのあついてんきではながくはもたないだろう。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, では particle, nai-form (持たない), だろう (conjecture). All technically N5 though complex.
verification.difficulty_notes: Upper N5. Complex sentence with double negation emphasis (長くは), abstract verb 持つ in this context, conjecture. Very challenging for N5.
verification.overall_notes: Grammar is technically N5 but sentence is quite complex and abstract. Borderline difficulty.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: にくとさかなどちらがすきですか。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: と particle, が particle, na-adjective (好き), です, か. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Comparison question with どちら. Clear and practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for comparison questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 豚肉 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはぶたにくがだいすきです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, が particle, na-adjective (大好き), です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple preference statement. Very clear.
verification.overall_notes: Perfect simple N5 example for expressing strong likes.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 豚肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ぶたにくはとりにくよりやすいです。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, より (comparison), i-adjective (安い), です. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Comparison sentence with より. Good grammar practice.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for comparative sentences.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 豚肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ぶたにくはとりにくよりやすい。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, より (comparison), i-adjective. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Comparison with より. Nearly identical to example_index 1.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. Essentially duplicate of example_index 1 without です.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 立つ appears at the end in dictionary form.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはずっとたつことができません。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential form できる (can do). Potential forms are N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to potential form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 potential form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 立つ appears in te-form 立って.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そこにたってください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle (location), te-form, ください (polite request). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple polite request with location. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for polite requests.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 立つ appears in ta-form 立った.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはたった。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, ta-form. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple past tense statement. Perfect for beginners.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for past tense.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 歌 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはうたをうたっている。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (歌っている - is singing). Progressive ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている progressive form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 歌 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そのうたをもういちどうたってください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, te-form, ください (polite request). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Polite request with もう一度 (one more time). Practical phrase.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for polite requests with repetition.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 歌 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: このうたをしっていますか。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (知っている - know). While 知る is special, ている is still N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains ている form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ビール appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはびーるをたくさんのんだ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, を particle, たくさん adverb, ta-form (飲んだ). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple past action with quantity adverb. Clear and direct.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for quantity expressions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ビール appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: びーるをもういっぱいください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, ください (request). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple request with counter. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Perfect N5 example for ordering/requesting with counters.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ビール appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: びーるはすきですか。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, na-adjective (好き), です, か. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple preference question. Perfect for beginners.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for preference questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鳥 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そらにとりがとんでいます。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (飛んでいます - are flying). Progressive ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている progressive form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鳥 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あそこでとりがないています。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (鳴いています - are chirping). Progressive ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている progressive form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 鳥 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あのとりをみてください。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, te-form, ください (polite request). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple polite request. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for requests to look at something.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 向こう appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: むこうにたかいたてものがあります。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: に particle (location), が particle, あります (existence). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5. Existence sentence with location. Clear structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for existence with location.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 向こう appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: そのおとこのこはむこうにいます。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, に particle (location), います (existence for people). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple existence/location sentence. Very clear.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for location with います.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 向こう appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはむこうのうえ、あのやまのうえにすんでいます。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ている form (住んでいます - lives/is living). State ている is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level due to ている form.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ている form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 上手 appears in 話上手 and 聞き上手.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: はなしじょうずもいれば、ききじょうずもいる。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ば conditional form (いれば - if there are). Conditional forms are N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level. Complex conditional pattern with contrast.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ば conditional form. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 上手 appears in 話し上手 and 聞き上手.
verification.kana_notes: Error: はなしじょうずといわれるにんもあれば should be はなしじょうずといわれるひともあれば. The kanji 人 should be ひと not にん.
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form 言われる (is said) and ば conditional. Both N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level. Passive and conditional forms.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 passive and conditional. Also kana error.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 上手 appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: りょうりがじょうずですね。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: が particle, na-adjective (上手), です, ね particle. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple compliment with skill adjective. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for compliments.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 上手 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: きみがこんなにりょうりがじょうずだとはしらなかった。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains と conditional/quotative (上手だとは). This complex pattern is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level. Complex embedded clause with と.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 conditional と pattern. Too complex for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 上手 appears at the end.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: あなたはえをかくのがじょうずですね。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, nominalizer (描くの), が particle, na-adjective, です, ね. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Nominalization with の. Good compliment pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with nominalization pattern for compliments.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 牛肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: これはぎゅうにく？それともぶたにく？
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, それとも (or), question intonation. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple either/or question. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for either/or questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 牛肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ぎゅうにくはたかい。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, i-adjective. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple descriptive statement. Perfect for beginners.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 牛肉 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: ぎゅうにくはとてもたかいんだ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, とても adverb, i-adjective, んだ explanatory. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple statement with emphasis. Natural conversational style.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with explanatory んだ ending.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 話 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: それからさきのはなしをききたい。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, を particle, tai-form (聞きたい - want to hear). Tai-form is acceptable N5.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5. Want-form with object. Slightly more complex structure.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with tai-form for expressing desires.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 話 appears in 彼の話.
verification.kana_notes: Error: かのはなしはたんじゅんそのものだった should be かれのはなしはたんじゅんそのものだった. The kanji 彼の should be かれの not かの.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, は particle, ta-form (だった). Grammar is N5 though そのもの is an advanced expression.
verification.difficulty_notes: Upper N5. Expression そのもの (itself) is quite abstract and advanced.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error and そのもの is too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 話 appears in 彼の話.
verification.kana_notes: Error: かのはなしは should be かれのはなしは. The kanji 彼の should be かれの not かの.
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: の particle, は particle, へ particle, dictionary form. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-high N5. Metaphorical use of 飛ぶ (jump) is somewhat advanced.
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error. Also metaphorical meaning is challenging.

verification.target_vocab_notes: This is problematic. はなし here is written in hiragana and means 'without/no' (話 meaning talk/story vs なし meaning without). The target vocab 話 (talk/story) is NOT present - this is なし (without).
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches: もうぱーてぃーはなしですよ。But this isn't the target vocabulary.
verification.grammar_notes: Grammar is N5 but this doesn't contain the target vocabulary.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low-mid N5 structurally, but wrong vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Target vocabulary NOT present. はなし here means 'without' not 'talk/story'. False positive.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 毎晩 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: わたしはまいばんいえにいます。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, に particle, います (existence). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple routine statement with time expression. Clear and practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for daily routines.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 毎晩 appears at the beginning.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: まいばんでんわするよ。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: dictionary form (する), よ particle. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple future habitual action. Natural and casual.
verification.overall_notes: Good simple N5 example for habitual actions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 毎晩 appears in the middle.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: かれはまいばんかのじょにでんわする。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, に particle, dictionary form (する). All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple habitual action statement. Clear structure.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent N5 example for habitual actions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吸う appears in nai-form 吸わない.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: たばこをすわないの？
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: を particle, nai-form (吸わない), の question ending. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Low N5. Simple negative question. Natural conversational style.
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example for negative questions with の.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吸う appears in nai-form 吸わない.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: たばこをすわないでほしいのですが。
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ほしい pattern (want someone to do). While ほしい itself is N5, the pattern ~てほしい (want someone to do) is N4 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 level. Complex desire pattern.
verification.overall_notes: Contains N4 ~てほしい pattern. Too advanced for N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 吸う appears in masu form 吸います.
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match: たばこはすいますか。
verification.grammar_notes: Uses: は particle, masu-form, か. All N5 grammar.
verification.difficulty_notes: Very low N5. Simple question with masu-form. Very practical.
verification.overall_notes: Excellent simple N5 example for basic questions.

verification.target_vocab_notes: This appears to be a false positive. すうっと means 'smoothly/swiftly' (onomatopoeia) and is not the verb 吸う (to smoke/inhale). The verb here is 着た (wore/put on), not 吸う.
verification.kana_notes: Error: すうっときた should be すうっときた. But more importantly, this doesn't contain the target verb 吸う.
verification.grammar_notes: Grammar is N5 but this sentence doesn't contain the target vocabulary.
verification.difficulty_notes: Inappropriate for target vocabulary.
verification.overall_notes: Target vocabulary NOT present. すうっと is onomatopoeia, not the verb 吸う. False positive.
